# Tide Life

> Tide Life is a research-grade peptide catalog carrying 95+ compounds — every vial ≥98% HPLC purity with a lot certificate of analysis, same-day US shipping before 2pm EST, and free shipping on orders over $200.

## Key facts
- 95+ research-grade peptide vials in stock
- ≥98% HPLC purity verified by independent third-party laboratory
- Lot CoA (certificate of analysis) included with every order
- Same-day shipping for orders placed before 2pm EST
- Tracked US delivery in 3–5 business days
- Free shipping on domestic orders over $200
- All products for in-vitro laboratory research use only

## Store categories
- [Fat Loss Peptides](https://tidelife.com/peptides/glp-weight-loss): Retatrutide, Tirzepatide, Semaglutide, Cagrilintide, AOD9604, Mazdutide, Survodutide, Tesofensine, Cagri-Sema, Cagri-Reta, Reta-Cagri — 14 products
- [Recovery & Healing](https://tidelife.com/peptides/recovery-healing): BPC-157, TB-500, BPC/TB Blend, PEG-MGF, Abaloparatide, ACE-031, P21 — 8 products
- [Growth Hormone Peptides](https://tidelife.com/peptides/growth-hormone): CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin, GHRP-2, GHRP-6, Hexarelin, IGF-1 LR3 and blends — 12 products
- [Skin & Beauty Peptides](https://tidelife.com/peptides/skin-beauty): GHK-Cu, GLOW Blend, KLOW Blend, Melanotan I, Melanotan II, SNAP-8 — 6 products
- [Nootropic Peptides](https://tidelife.com/peptides/nootropics-cognitive): N-Acetyl Semax Amidate, Selank, NA-Selank, Adamax, PE-22-28, DSIP, SLU-PP-332 — 9 products
- [Longevity Peptides](https://tidelife.com/peptides/longevity): Epitalon, NA-Epitalon, NAD+, FOXO4-DRI, PNC-27, MOTS-c, SS-31 — 7 products
- [Immune & Hormonal Peptides](https://tidelife.com/peptides/immune-hormonal): Thymosin Alpha-1, LL-37, PT-141, Kisspeptin-10, Gonadorelin, Oxytocin, KPV, ARA-290, VIP — 10 products
- [Energy & Metabolic](https://tidelife.com/peptides/energy-metabolic): BAM-15, AICAR, Glutathione, L-Carnitine, Methylene Blue, O-304, Adipotide — 10 products
- [Khavinson Bioregulators](https://tidelife.com/peptides/khavinson): 16 organ-specific Russian peptide bioregulators — Bronchogen, Cardiogen, Cartalax, Chonluten, Cortagen, Crystagen, Livagen, Ovagen, Pancragen, Pinealon, Prostamax, Testagen, Thymogen, Vesilute, Vesugen, Vilon

## Ordering, shipping, returns
- Same-day shipping for orders placed before 2pm EST on business days
- Tracked US courier delivery in 3–5 business days
- Free shipping on all domestic orders of $200 or more
- Unopened products may be returned within 14 days of delivery
- All vials ship with original lot certificate of analysis

## Disclaimer
All products are sold for in-vitro laboratory research use only. Not for human consumption, veterinary use, or household use. Must be 18+ to purchase.
